geographies.name: Zone I
geographies.description: General port waters and interior docking areas

geographies.name: Zone II (Campo de Boyas)
geographies.description: Buoy field area for offshore operations

Zone_I: All interior berths and piers within the port perimeter
Zone_II: Campo de Boyas (Buoy Field / Offshore Terminal)

billing_logic_definitions.service_basis: Rates are applied per service regardless of the number of tugboats used
billing_logic_definitions.tariff_nature: Maximum tariffs applicable in the absence of effective competition to ensure transparency and objectivity
billing_logic_definitions.calculation_formula: Total Service Charge = Fixed Part + (Variable Part * Vessel GT)
billing_logic_definitions.billing_restrictions: Surcharges for night-time operations or holidays are strictly prohibited per Article 113.4 of TRLPEMM

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Vessel Without Engine (Sin Máquina)
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Maneuvers for vessels with inactive or deficient propulsion
surcharges_and_multipliers.applied_to: Total established tariff (Fixed + Variable) for the corresponding range and type

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Movement Along Same Pier
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Vessel shifting position within the same berth
surcharges_and_multipliers.applied_to: Maximum tariff established by vessel type and GT range

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Interior Movement
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Vessel shifting between different interior locations
surcharges_and_multipliers.note: Charged at 100% of the standard maneuver tariff

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Maneuver Delay
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Delay exceeding 30 minutes due to causes imputable to the vessel

surcharges_and_multipliers.name: Maneuver Suspension
surcharges_and_multipliers.condition: Service cancelled by vessel after tugs have arrived at the maneuver start point
surcharges_and_multipliers.note: Unique fixed surcharge independent of vessel GT

emergency_and_special_services.service_type: Pollution Control, Salvage, or General Emergency

activity_fee_tasa_de_actividad.calculation_basis: Applied to the GT of the vessel served
activity_fee_tasa_de_actividad.note: Payable by the license holder per service

occupation_fee_tasa_de_ocupacion.condition: Applicable if the service provider utilizes a domain concession
occupation_fee_tasa_de_ocupacion.note: Governed by Articles 173 to 182 of TRLPEMM

temporary_service_suspension.condition: Non-payment of tariffs for at least one month after formal request
temporary_service_suspension.requirement: Requires explicit authorization from the Port Authority and 15-day resolution period
